title: christella esquirolii
intro: Christella esquirolii, also known as the Chinese tassel fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Christella esquirolii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Christella esquirolii plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
